findings.location: sections.s1 — second annotation equivalent code block
findings.description: The annotation equivalent for the CodeValue/Map example omits `@PropertyName("都道府県")` and `@Required` from the code snippet. The knowledge file shows only `@CodeValue(...)`, but the source explicitly shows all three annotations (`@PropertyName`, `@Required`, `@CodeValue`) as the full equivalent, making the knowledge file's equivalent appear incomplete.
`PropertyName` and `@PropertyName` are absent from the hints array, despite `@PropertyName` appearing in both annotation-equivalent code examples in the source.
findings.source_evidence: @PropertyName("昼間連絡先電話番号") ... @PropertyName("都道府県")
